title: Allow Linking Existing Doc to Portfolio Project Status Summary
excerpt:

posts.author: EricaW (Erica Weinberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the Portfolio Projects List under Project Status Summary allow connecting/linking to an existing monday.com doc rather than only offering the option to create a new doc.
Our complex projects are configured using an App that includes a couple preconfigured template boards, template status doc, and template training/resource docs. We wouldn’t want to create another summary/status doc, but rather simply point to the existing doc.
